e0540512-eb98-4340-9288-bc4bd415f18c.name: vCenter Total Photon VM vCPUs
e0540512-eb98-4340-9288-bc4bd415f18c.formula: sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=VirtualMachine, metric=cpu|corecount_provisioned, depth=4, where ="config|guestFullName contains Photon"})
e0540512-eb98-4340-9288-bc4bd415f18c.description: Total number of vCPU allocated to all Photon VMs in vCenter
